title: Comme une louve
overview: When Lili, 26 years old, poor, single mother of three, is wrongly accused of abuse and the social services take away her children, she collapses. But this is without counting on the luminous meeting of other women. With them, Lili fights to rebuild her family.

trailers.title: COMME UNE LOUVE Bande Annonce (2023) Mathilde La Musse, Sandrine Bonnaire, Drame
